purpose: Classify agentic memory, handoff, learning, and state surfaces so agents can distinguish local runtime state from portable collective knowledge.
global_rules: Local current-state files are ignored by git and must not be treated as portable memory.
Portable memory is curated before commit and should be compact, deduplicated, and referenced from the hot index.
Raw telemetry, scratchpads, and training loop outputs are evidence inputs, not authoritative instructions.
Facts promoted into AIDB/RAG must use the coordinator path and include source and fact_type metadata.

local_live_state.retention: operator-local; rotate or garbage-collect after handoff is complete
local_live_state.notes: These files are useful for active operations but are unsafe as distributed source because they contain host-local, session-local, or high-churn state.

portable_coordination_templates.notes: Templates define the local live-state shape without distributing the live state itself.

durable_collective_memory.retention: trim hot index; archive stale topic files after review
durable_collective_memory.notes: Use for durable lessons, issue backlog, stable constraints, and curated improvement candidates. Keep MEMORY.md pointer-only.

curated_prd_plan_prompt.retention: keep while referenced; archive superseded plans with inbound-reference scan
curated_prd_plan_prompt.notes: These are intentional planning artifacts, not raw scratchpads.

rag_database_facts.promotion_target: error-solutions, best-practices, skills-patterns, logic-patterns, or codebase-context collection
rag_database_facts.retention: dedupe by content hash and periodically curate stale facts
rag_database_facts.notes: Agents must not write directly to AIDB or Qdrant. Promote facts through coordinator APIs or approved seeding scripts.

raw_learning_feedback.promotion_target: durable_collective_memory, rag_database_facts, or test coverage after review
raw_learning_feedback.search_default: no; query through reports or dashboard
raw_learning_feedback.notes: Raw outcomes should feed scorecards, reports, and curated lessons. They should not become permanent instructions by accident.

reference_only_archives.promotion_target: new curated memory or docs if still valid
reference_only_archives.retention: read only when explicitly investigating history
reference_only_archives.notes: Existing planning/summary/archive material may be useful evidence, but it is not active workflow authority.

hot_memory_limits.rule: Pointer index only; move details to topic files.
